name: Fortune Minerals Limited
description: Fortune Minerals Limited is a Canadian mining company focused on developing the NICO cobalt-gold-bismuth-copper project in the Northwest Territories and a planned refinery in Alberta. The NICO project is positioned to become a reliable North American producer of cobalt and bismuth, which are critical minerals used in lithium-ion batteries, clean energy technologies, and various industrial applications, alongside co-product gold and copper.
